Motion To Compel Production Of Documents From Dfs; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities; Request For Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar May-13-2024 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: RE: PLAINTIFF GAIL THEARLE's Motion To Compel Production Of Documents From Dfs; Request For Monetary Sanctions.

Appearances (via Zoom videoconference):

Jack R. Davis, Esq., of KERSHAW TALLEY BARLOW PC, (916) 779-7000, for Plaintiff.

Michael G. Kline, Esq., of LEWIS BRISBOIS BISGAARD & SMITH LLP, (925) 357-3456, for Defendant DFS Group L.P.

Counsel for Plaintiff and Defendant stipulate to the matter being decided by the judge pro tem. Counsel and the judge pro tem (all appearing remotely) authorize the clerk to sign the formal stipulation on their behalf.

The matter is argued. At conclusion of argument, the matter is taken under submission.

Judge Pro Tem: Scott Borrowman. Clerk: R. Woods. Not Reported. (302/JPT)
